durable_progress.change: Replaced bounded account-wide Pages project enumeration with direct exact-project lookup.
durable_progress.reason: The former per_page=100 list could omit the target project in larger accounts and exposed unrelated project names in proof artifacts.
durable_progress.verification: 7 deterministic Node.js tests passed; no live provider request was available.

remaining_blocker: Configure valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, then dispatch the deployment workflow and require a resolving URL, served research identity, exact commit manifest, and accepted proof packet.
next_action: Run .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml with valid Cloudflare credentials and inspect cloudflare-access-probe.json for direct target-project resolution before deployment.
